headline: Why Micron and other chip stocks are bouncing back so strongly
detail: Positive news for your tech/chip heavy portfolio. A strong bounce could help mitigate losses in SOXL and SMH. Remember SOXL is leveraged and carries a 'SELL' signal.
rec: Monitor SOXL and SMH for potential recovery, but prioritize risk management on SOXL given its 'SELL' status and deep loss.

headline: Forget Nvidia. These 5 S&P 500 stocks are quietly going all in on AI.
detail: Reinforces the ongoing AI narrative as a market driver beyond just Nvidia. This broadens potential AI-driven growth across the S&P 500, benefiting QQQ, SPY, and potentially CRWD.
rec: MSFT on the scanner (entry 397.35-396.95, stop 395.73) aligns with this AI theme and has a strong setup. Consider if looking to add exposure.
